p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(f(x), c)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) / x2 = const_div_right(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, c)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) * x2 = const_mul_right(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, c.inverse)

goal: const_div_right(f, c, x) = const_mul_right(f, c.inverse, x)
